headline: PwC UK Partners with Leah on Agentic AI Platform
summary: PwC UK has partnered with contract lifecycle management provider Leah to power agentic operating models through AI. The partnership deepens their collaboration to build AI-powered systems that can operate autonomously in legal and business processes.
so_what: This signals PwC's push into autonomous AI systems that could transform how healthcare organizations manage contracts and compliance processes. Healthcare consultants should watch how agentic AI evolves beyond legal into clinical operations.
original_title: CLM Provider Leah Deepens Partnership With PwC UK to Fortify Agentic Operating System
